text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and arXiv ID 2407.15261 is real, but its actual title is "Pandora's Box Problem With Time Constraints," not "Pandora's box problem over time." The cited authors (Amanatidis, Fusco, Reiffenhäuser, Tsikiridis) are a subset of the real author list, which also includes Ben Berger, Tomer Ezra, and Michal Feldman; the four cited authors correspond to an earlier conference version of the work. This appears to be a minor title variant and partial author list, not a fabricated reference.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.15261
